title: 京王杯ジュニアSの後に・いざ春へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pleased with her performance, Sakura Bakushin O
is raring to go take on the Classic Triple Crown
tour. But I fear it's still too risky for her to take up
the challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Stalling for time to think things over, I ask her to
run the Spring Stakes instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O decides to compete, assured
that the Spring Stakes is but a stepping stone to
eventually challenge the Satsuki Sho.
